---
agent: Instructions Generator
---
Take the information provided below and generate an agent instructions .md file for it in the docs/ directory. If .md filename is provided use that otherwise generate a concise filename based on the content. Make sure the instructions are clear and concise not too long. Make sure to update the AGENTS.md file to reference the new docs file. If no information is provided below, prompt user to give necessary details about the layer of the architecture or coding standard to document.
